site.title: Al-Sharq College | كلية الشرق
site.desc: Al-Sharq College - A leading educational institution in higher education
site.name: Al-Sharq College

hero.title: Tradition & Innovation
hero.desc: Al-Sharq College combines the authenticity of time-honored education with the latest learning methods to graduate future leaders.

hero.title: More Than Just Study
hero.desc: An integrated university environment that combines academic excellence with a vibrant student life.

hero.title: Pioneering Research
hero.desc: We focus on innovative scientific research to meet the challenges of the present and future.

hero.title: Welcome
hero.desc: We welcome students and faculty from all over the world to our campus.

features.title: Academic Programs
features.desc: Over 140 diverse study programs in various scientific and humanitarian disciplines.

features.title: Student Portal
features.desc: Organize daily academic life through the electronic portal system.

features.title: Open Day
features.desc: Learn about the study programs and specializations available for 2026.

sidecards.title: Research Database
sidecards.desc: Browse research projects and scientific publications

sidecards.title: Diversity - Family - Openness
sidecards.desc: We believe in diversity, equal opportunity, and openness to the world

highlight.title: Medical Information Engineering
highlight.desc: This program combines technology and medicine to qualify cadres capable of developing innovative solutions for the future of healthcare.
highlight.campaign_sub: Freedom of education and research is the foundation of our democracy
highlight.campaign_desc: We believe in open dialogue and free scientific exchange. Al-Sharq College supports democratic values and peaceful coexistence without discrimination.

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.welcome: Hello! I'm the AI assistant of Al-Sharq College. How can I help you?
responses: You can explore our various academic programs in the Academics section.
For admission requirements and deadlines, please visit the Admission page.
Our campus facilities include libraries, labs, sports centers, and student housing.
You can contact the registration office at 07744445669 during working hours.
We offer bachelor's, master's, PhD, and diploma programs across multiple disciplines.
Our research centers focus on medical engineering, AI, and sustainable development.
Student activities include clubs, sports teams, cultural events, and volunteer programs.
Official working hours: Sunday to Thursday from 8:00 AM to 3:00 PM.
The college is located in Basra - Al-Zaytoun District - Hamdan Road. You can visit us during office hours.
For inquiries, you can email us or call 07870703000.
We provide a fully integrated digital library with thousands of books and scientific articles.
You can apply online through the electronic admission portal on our website.
Scholarships are available for outstanding students and students with limited income.
Student life at Al-Sharq College is full of events and activities throughout the year.
We have partnerships with Arab and international universities for student and faculty exchange.
Registration for the next semester begins in August each year.
We offer academic advising services for new students to help them choose their majors.
College labs are equipped with the latest devices and scientific technologies.
Students can benefit from practical training programs in cooperation with the private sector.
We have a continuing education center offering training courses and professional certificates.
greetings: Hello! How can I help you today?
Hi there! I'm here to assist you. What can I do for you?
Welcome! How may I help you?
Hello! Feel free to ask me anything about Al-Sharq College.
Hi! I'm the AI assistant. What would you like to know?
Greetings! I'm happy to help. What's your question?
